name: Fotopro DV-2 DV 2 Professional Tripod Video
description: Video Tripod specially designed for Videographers,The material used is Aluminum, with 3 sections which makes this video tripod more sturdy and flexible, the durability of this tripod can withstand loads of up to 8 kg.

features.Key Features:: Max.Load : 8kg | Max.Height : 1800mm | Lowest : 680mm | Material : Aluminum | Section : 3-sec | Weight(g) : 3850g | Diameter : 18mm | Folded : 860mm
features.Whats In The Box?: 1x Fotopro Tripod Video DV2 | 1x Warranty card
